AgencyID: Identifier for the agency or organization managing the consumer profile.
FirstName: First name of the consumer, possibly inconsistently capitalized.
NetWorth: Financial net worth of the consumer, measured in dollars.
NumberCreditCards: Number of credit cards the consumer possesses.
LastName: Last name of the consumer, possibly inconsistently capitalized.
AddressLine2: Secondary address line, typically for apartment or suite numbers.
MaritalStatus: Marital status code of the consumer (W: Married, U: Unmarried, S: Separated).
Gender: Gender of the consumer (f: Female, F: Female).
NumberChildren: Number of children in the household.
AddressLine1: Primary address line of the consumer.
PostalCode: Postal code of the consumer's address.
